task.title: QA Dashboard v2 — Full Router + Design Token Audit
task.description: Prime deployed Dashboard v2 with major architectural changes. Need full QA pass on the new router-based architecture, design token system, and all surfaces.
deliverables: Verify all routes work: /dashboard, /hub, /chat (no 404s on direct navigation)
Verify CSS design tokens render correctly (--surface-0 through --surface-3, --text-primary/secondary/muted, --border-subtle, --elev-1/2, --accent)
Verify DashboardSurface: KPIs, onboarding flow, runtime fleet, model usage, alerts all render
Verify HubSurface: live feed, filters, thread drilldown, context focus all work
Verify ChatPage: guided/pro modes, model selector, settings panel, message send
Verify LandingPage: hero, how-it-works, features, pricing, email capture
Verify AppShell sidebar: navigation, agent list, session list, user section, collapse behavior
Mobile responsive check: sidebar drawer, panel collapse, stacked cards under 768px
Verify Auth: login, signup, Google OAuth, logout flow through new router
Security: check no auth tokens in URL params, no XSS in chat messages
Check for console errors, broken imports, missing assets
